title: AI-Snake chat memory, CodeCompass context and worker-backed fluent chat configuration
purpose: Harden the AI-Snake chat mode so it reliably uses conversation history, rolling summaries, CodeCompass/RAG context and the selected backend/worker path while staying responsive. The behavior must be visible and configurable in the AI-Snake visual/chat settings.
goal: Make the Snake Chat assistant remember previous user/AI turns through a configurable short history plus rolling summary, pass that memory into every backend including ananta-worker and propose-based worker paths, expose CodeCompass/RAG and worker settings in the TUI config panel, and keep chat fluent through timeouts, streaming/partial updates, context budgets and fallback behavior.

context.user_goal: Der AI-Snake Chat soll den Chatverlauf verwenden, sich an vorheriges erinnern, Zusammenfassungen in den Prompt geben, CodeCompass und ananta-worker korrekt nutzen und das alles in den AI-Snake visuellen und Chat-Einstellungen konfigurierbar machen.
current_observations: client_surfaces/operator_tui/chat_mixin.py already extracts up to the last 6 ai:tutor messages via _extract_prior_messages and passes them to local/openai/lmstudio chat completions.
Question-specific RAG and CodeCompass source-pack preview are already called in _resolve_ask_question before constructing context_text.
The default backend is ananta-worker, and /snake/ask receives question, context and depth only. It does not currently receive structured prior_messages or rolling summary payload.
opencode/hermes worker-propose path builds a prompt from depth/context/question but currently does not include prior_messages or rolling summary explicitly.

ai_snake_config_view.py already exposes many chat settings: chat_backend, chat_backend_model, chat_use_codecompass, local project, Wikipedia, source pack, context chars, max tokens, RAG top-k and answer chars.
No dedicated rolling chat summary config or persisted memory controls were found in the current search.
context.design_decision: Do not rely on raw full chat history. Use a two-layer memory model: recent turns plus rolling summary. Both must be bounded by configurable budgets and passed consistently to LMStudio/local, ananta-worker /snake/ask, and worker-propose paths.
required_memory_layers: recent_turns: last N user/assistant messages with configurable max turns and char budget
rolling_summary: compact summary updated after answers or after every K turns
active_target_context: selected artifact/goal/terminal excerpt already supported and should remain first-class
codecompass_context: source-pack/project references and RAG snippets
runtime_status_context: selected backend, view, snake state and visible TUI focus if enabled
non_goals: Do not send unbounded raw chat history to workers.
Do not silently include local project or CodeCompass context when settings disable it.
Do not block the TUI event loop while summary generation or worker calls run.
Do not require ananta-worker for chat to function; fallback backend remains necessary.

milestones.title: Current behavior docs and memory contract

tasks.title: Document current Snake Chat context flow
tasks.description: Document the current flow from AI chat message to _resolve_ask_question, CodeCompass/RAG context, backend selection and response posting.
acceptance_criteria: Docs include Mermaid sequence diagram for chat input -> history extraction -> CodeCompass/RAG -> backend -> chat response.
Docs explicitly state which backends receive prior_messages today and which do not.
Docs explain the difference between chat_backend and ai_snake_provider_preference.
Docs list all existing relevant settings from ai_snake_config_view.py.

tasks.title: Define ChatMemoryContext contract
tasks.description: Create a structured memory object containing recent turns, rolling summary, active target, CodeCompass references and RAG snippets.
acceptance_criteria: ChatMemoryContext contains recent_turns, rolling_summary, active_target_excerpt, codecompass_refs, rag_snippets, runtime_status and metadata.
Every field has explicit char/turn limits.
The object is serializable for worker payloads and diagnostics.
Sensitive/local context inclusion respects chat_include_local_project, chat_use_codecompass and related settings.

tasks.title: Replace ad-hoc prior message extraction with configurable recent-turn memory
tasks.description: Generalize _extract_prior_messages from fixed last 6 turns to configurable recent chat memory.
acceptance_criteria: Settings chat_use_history, chat_history_turns and chat_history_chars control recent-turn inclusion.
Current question is excluded from prior history exactly once.
User and assistant messages are preserved with roles.
Control/system messages can be included or excluded by config, default excluded except summary-relevant messages.
Tests cover fixed-size trimming and current-question de-duplication.

tasks.title: Implement rolling chat summary state
tasks.description: Maintain a compact summary of previous chat turns so the AI remembers beyond the recent-turn window.
acceptance_criteria: Rolling summary is stored in chat_state or header_logo_game under a clear key such as chat_memory_summary.
Summary has configurable max chars via chat_summary_chars.
Summary update can run after every answer or every configured number of turns without blocking the UI loop.
If summary update fails, chat still works with recent turns only.
Summary is visible in diagnostics when debug mode is enabled.

tasks.title: Implement ChatPromptBuilder with explicit context budget policy
tasks.description: Replace scattered prompt construction with one builder that orders and trims active target, summary, recent turns, CodeCompass and RAG context.
acceptance_criteria: Builder supports budget policy active_target_then_summary_then_recent_then_codecompass_then_rag.
Builder produces OpenAI-style messages for LMStudio/local backends.
Builder produces plain prompt text for propose/worker backends.
Builder produces structured v2 payload for ananta-worker /snake/ask.
Builder diagnostics show included sections and char counts.

tasks.title: Make CodeCompass/RAG context fully configurable for chat
tasks.description: Keep existing chat CodeCompass settings but make their effective status and retrieval results transparent.
acceptance_criteria: chat_use_codecompass disables CodeCompass references and source pack preview completely.
chat_include_local_project and chat_include_wikipedia are respected in SourcePackService calls.
chat_rag_top_k controls question RAG top-k consistently.
Diagnostics show CodeCompass enabled/disabled, source pack id, number of refs and number of RAG snippets.
If CodeCompass retrieval fails, chat continues with a visible but non-spamming warning.

tasks.title: Add runtime status context as optional prompt section
tasks.description: Allow the AI-Snake chat to know current TUI mode, active center view, selected artifact and focus/scroll state when enabled.
acceptance_criteria: Setting chat_include_runtime_status controls this section.
Runtime status includes active view, chat backend, visual provider, selected artifact/goal and snake state where available.
Runtime status is capped to a small char budget.
Runtime status never includes secrets/tokens.

tasks.title: Extend /snake/ask worker payload to include memory context
tasks.description: Send structured memory to ananta-worker/hub snake ask endpoint instead of only question/context/depth.
acceptance_criteria: Client sends payload v2 with question, depth, context, recent_turns, rolling_summary, codecompass_refs, rag_snippets and metadata when chat_pass_memory_to_worker is enabled.
Server remains backward-compatible with old payload containing only question/context/depth.
Worker prompt includes rolling summary and recent turns in the correct order.
If worker rejects v2 payload, client falls back to v1 or local LLM according to config.

tasks.title: Include memory context in worker-propose prompt path
tasks.description: Ensure opencode/hermes/worker-propose chat prompts include recent turns and rolling summary, not only depth/context/question.
acceptance_criteria: _tutorial_ai_worker_chat_ask or replacement builder includes rolling summary and recent turns when enabled.
Prompt remains concise enough for quick chat mode by respecting chat_context_chars and chat_history_chars.
Provider-specific payload keeps provider/model parameters intact.
Tests verify prior user question is visible in generated propose prompt.

tasks.title: Make ananta-worker/propose chat mode selectable and explicit
tasks.description: Expose whether chat uses /snake/ask, /step/propose, LMStudio, opencode or hermes paths.
acceptance_criteria: Setting chat_worker_mode supports snake_ask, propose, auto and disabled for worker backends.
Settings UI shows current effective worker endpoint/base URL.
Diagnostics show which backend path answered the last chat response.
Fallback path is visible when ananta-worker times out or returns empty.

tasks.title: Add worker response metadata and latency diagnostics
tasks.description: Track whether answer came from worker, propose or local backend and how long it took.
acceptance_criteria: Game/chat state records last_chat_backend_used, last_chat_backend_path, last_chat_latency_ms and last_chat_fallback_reason.
AI-Snake config/status panel can show last backend result.
Timeouts and empty responses are visible but not spammed.
Metrics are testable without real network calls.

tasks.title: Extend AI-Snake config UI with memory settings
tasks.description: Add user-visible settings for chat history, summary and worker memory propagation.
acceptance_criteria: Persistent keys include chat_use_history, chat_history_turns, chat_history_chars, chat_use_summary, chat_summary_chars, chat_summary_update_every_turns and chat_pass_memory_to_worker.
Config view lists these settings with clear German labels.
apply_ai_snake_config_value supports changing these settings.
Settings persist via save_tui_chat_settings.

tasks.title: Split visual AI-Snake and chat AI settings more clearly
tasks.description: Make clear which settings affect visual snake behavior and which affect chat answer generation.
acceptance_criteria: Config UI groups settings into Visual AI-Snake, Chat Backend, Chat Context/Memory and CodeCompass/RAG.
Visual provider setting does not imply chat backend setting unless explicitly linked by config.
Chat provider setting does not affect visual snake heuristic provider unless explicitly linked.
Help text or labels make the distinction obvious.

tasks.title: Add chat prompt preview/debug view
tasks.description: Allow debugging what context actually reaches the selected backend without exposing secrets by default.
acceptance_criteria: Debug view can show included section names and char counts.
Optional redacted prompt preview can be enabled by config.
Preview shows whether recent turns, summary, CodeCompass and RAG were included.
Preview redacts tokens and configured sensitive patterns.

tasks.title: Improve chat fluency with partial responses and non-blocking summary updates
tasks.description: Keep the TUI responsive while chat responses and summaries are generated.
acceptance_criteria: Main TUI event loop is not blocked by chat answer generation or summary generation.
Streaming/partial updates continue to populate llm_streaming_partial where backend supports it.
Summary updates use a separate timeout and do not delay posting the main answer.
If a backend is slow, status shows pending/timeout and the chat remains usable.

tasks.title: Add backend fallback policy for chat answers
tasks.description: Make fallback from ananta-worker/propose to LMStudio/local explicit and configurable.
acceptance_criteria: Setting chat_backend_fallback supports none, lmstudio and local_knowledge.
Fallback reason is recorded and visible in diagnostics.
Fallback does not silently drop memory context.
Tests cover worker timeout falling back to local backend.

tasks.title: Add chat context health indicator
tasks.description: Expose whether the last chat answer used history, summary, CodeCompass, RAG and which backend.
acceptance_criteria: Status/config panel shows compact indicators: history, summary, codecompass, rag, backend, latency.
Indicators update after each AI chat answer.
Indicators distinguish disabled, empty, failed and included states.
Indicators are testable through state fields.

tasks.title: Add unit tests for ChatMemoryContext and prompt builder
tasks.description: Verify bounded memory construction and prompt section ordering.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover recent-turn trimming by turns and chars.
Tests cover rolling summary inclusion and disable flag.
Tests cover CodeCompass/RAG inclusion toggles.
Tests cover prompt/payload output for local LLM, worker v2 and propose modes.

tasks.title: Add tests for ananta-worker memory payload
tasks.description: Ensure worker-backed chat receives summary and prior turns when configured.
acceptance_criteria: Test asserts /snake/ask v2 payload contains recent_turns and rolling_summary.
Test asserts disabling chat_pass_memory_to_worker removes memory fields.
Test asserts backward-compatible v1 fallback can be used when required.
Test uses mocked HTTP endpoint, not a real worker.

tasks.title: Add E2E chat memory scenario in autonomous mode
tasks.description: Use autonomous Snake Chat mode to verify the second question can see previous context.
acceptance_criteria: Fixture sends a first AI chat message with a named fact.
Fixture sends a second AI chat message asking about that fact.
Mock backend asserts recent_turns or summary contain the first fact.
Test verifies answer/result marker indicates history_used=true.
Test runs without real LLM, worker, CodeCompass or network.

tasks.title: Add tests for AI-Snake config persistence of memory settings
tasks.description: Verify memory-related settings are visible, changeable and persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify ai_snake_config_items includes history, summary and worker memory settings.
Tests verify apply_ai_snake_config_value updates these settings.
Tests verify persistence payload includes the new keys.
Tests verify invalid values are rejected with clear messages.

summary_notes: Current code already includes last AI chat turns for LMStudio/local chat completions, but worker/ananta-worker paths need explicit memory payload support.
CodeCompass and RAG are already present, but need stronger diagnostics and UI visibility for effective included/disabled/failed states.
Rolling summary memory is not yet present and should be added for longer conversations.
Visual AI-Snake provider and Chat provider should be clearly separated in settings.

end_summaries.title: Expected result after completion
items: AI-Snake Chat remembers recent messages and longer-term rolling summary.
CodeCompass/RAG, active target and runtime context inclusion are configurable and visible.
ananta-worker and propose-backed worker paths receive the same memory context as local LLM chat.
Chat remains fluent through background execution, streaming/partial updates and explicit fallbacks.
AI-Snake visual settings and chat settings are clearly separated but configurable from the TUI.
